ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the track */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the track */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album the track belongs to */,
  "uri" TEXT /* Uniform Resource Identifier (URI) for the track */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the track (e.g., audio_features, album) */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the track */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the track (e.g., Spotify, Apple Music) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the track was released */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the track contains explicit content */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the track (0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of music the artist is associated with */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the artist */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Date when the artist or band was founded */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the artist has */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the artist's profile image */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio feature */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track the feature belongs to */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the track (0-1) */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the track (0-1) */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Key of the track (0-11) */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the track in decibels */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the track (0-1) */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the track (0-1) */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the track (0-1) */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence of the track (0-1) */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track in beats per minute */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the track (0-1) */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness of the track (0-1) */,
  "time_signature" INTEGER /* Time signature of the track */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_features_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (for hierarchical genre classification) */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the genre icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moods" (
  "mood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mood */,
  "mood_name" TEXT /* Name of the mood */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mood */,
  "parent_mood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent mood (for hierarchical mood classification) */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the mood icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_moods" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "mood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mood associated with the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id", "mood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., music analyst, data scientist, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive, banned) */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "cover_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the playlist cover image */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the playlist was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the playlist was last updated */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the playlist is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track in the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play history */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who played the track */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track played */,
  "play_date" TEXT /* Date when the track was played */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the track has been played by the user */,
  "last_played_date" TEXT /* Date when the track was last played by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_history_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the track is recommended */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended track */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date when the track was recommended */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation (e.g., based on listening history, similar artists) */,
  "score" REAL /* Recommendation score (0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
